2606.16330.title: Phase-Aware Guidance Injection for Recurrent MAPPO in Assembly-Line Disruption Recovery
2606.16330.paper_summary: Disruption recovery in industrial assembly lines requires timely decisions under machine faults, worker absence, and emergency orders. Existing methods either rely on rigid handcrafted recovery logic or learn adaptive policies that do not readily exploit heterogeneous external recovery knowledge at decision time to reduce abnormal recovery time (ART) and preserve on-time delivery (OTD). To address this gap, we propose a phase-aware guidance injection framework that augments a trained recurrent MAPPO (RMAPPO) scheduling policy through logit-level action bias during evaluation. The framework provides a unified decision-time interface for rule-based, replay-based, and online LLM-based guidance, while activating intervention only during abnormal and recovery phases. Experiments on a custom AssemblyLineEnv show that high-quality rule guidance yields the strongest gains, replay-based guidance degrades smoothly under imperfect availability, and online LLM guidance still provides useful intermediate improvements. These results show that decision-time guidance injection can exploit heterogeneous recovery hints without redesigning the actor.
2606.16330.paper_summary_zh: 工業裝配線的中斷恢復需要在機器故障、工人缺席和緊急訂單下及時做出決策。現有的方法要麼依賴僵化的手工恢復邏輯，要麼學習不容易在決策時利用異質外部恢復知識的自適應策略，以減少異常恢復時間（ART）並保持準時交付（OTD）。為了解決這一問題，我們提出了一個階段感知的指導注入框架，通過在評估期間的logit級別行動偏差來增強訓練過的循環MAPPO（RMAPPO）排程策略。該框架提供了一個統一的決策時間介面，用於基於規則、基於重播和基於在線LLM的指導，同時僅在異常和恢復階段啟動干預。在自定義的AssemblyLineEnv上的實驗顯示，高質量的規則指導產生了最強的增益，基於重播的指導在不完美可用性下平穩降級，而在線LLM指導仍然提供有用的中間改進。這些結果顯示，決策時間的指導注入可以在不重新設計演員的情況下利用異質的恢復提示。
2606.16330.author: Xin Huang et.al.
2606.16330.authors: Xin Huang, Yongcai Wang, Fengyi Zhang, Zhikun Tao, Yunjun Han, Naiqi Wu
